Nanhai Intelligent Devices Co., Ltd. (Issuer; U S C C: 9Y1 2A3B4 5C6D7E8F9) Incident Report CN–PIPL/CSL/DSL – 2026-06-05 08:20 CST
Filed to Nanhai Stock Exchange (NSE) and Zhonghua Securities Regulatory Bureau (ZSRB) as a preliminary notice; not yet publicly disclosed and therefore constitutes inside information under issuer rules.
On 2026-06-03, intrusion via third-party benefits portal “LotusPay HR” and VPN appliance “WindFox-310” led to exfiltration of HR records, medical subsidy files, and an access key to the Finance draft folder.
Identified subjects (examples): Ms. Qian Ruo (Resident ID: 37 0 9********** 764X), union membership: Yongdao Tech Workers Union; HR survey captured her sexual orientation as bisexual; email: qian.ruo@nanhaidevices.cn.
Mr. Han Yufeng (R e s . I D: 44************12 8), biometric: facial recognition template (FaceMap v2) and palm vein hash; pre-employment genetic screening record indicating beta-thalassemia carrier status.
Miss Zhou Yuting (dependent; age 13), pediatric asthma treatment invoices under employee Mr. Zhou Kai (Res. ID: 51************33 6); minor data flagged under PIPL Art. 28; contact masked: zhou.kai+guardian@nanhaidevices.cn.
Additional fields included vaccination codes and hospital names; the phrase political affiliation appears in a training checklist here only as a heading and not tied to a person.
Systems impacted: HR onboarding workflow, payroll export SFTP, and budgeting folder; finance draft contained Q2 unaudited revenue and a draft supplier framework with Qiyun Robotics Co. (counterparty U S C C: 7Z 7Z 7Z 7Z 7Z 7Z 7Z 7Z 7Z), constituting MNPI before public disclosure.
Cross-border context: Backups synced to OrchidCloud-SG (region sg-east-2) at https://vault.orchidcloud.sg/bucket?id=cn-ndev&obj=hr.zip&uid=cnid_37**********764X; ZCO cross-border filing and Standard Contract will be initiated within 10 working days.
Location markers in logs include Yongdao District, Huapu City, and a hostname “nse-t1.hxroom”; note: references to the Nanhai Tigers sports club in a test dataset are non-personal and irrelevant.
Containment: access tokens rotated, BlueCrane IDS signatures updated, RedPanda WAF rules deployed; preliminary assessment indicates no material adverse change and no MAC trigger under NSE Listing Manual (internal policy name only).
Employment workflows temporarily paused for new hires; existing employees continue unaffected; our project kanban notes (“todo: fix runbook; de dupe id-map; avoid hardcoded secret”) are operational and not personal data.
Notifications: individualized notices to 214 staff begin 2026-06-06; DPO: Dr. Liao Mei, dpo@nanhaidevices.cn, hotline +86-20-0000-0000; issuer liaison: Mr. Chen Rui, ir@nanhaidevices.cn.
Compliance: data minimization and retention per Company Privacy Policy v3.4; CSL OCII status: not applicable; DSL classification: Important Data (tentative), pending ZSRB guidance; religious beliefs or party membership fields are prohibited in production and any occurrence in test data will be purged.
Public-source references (company website, product brochures for WindFox-310, and a generic DEI statement) were attached for context only and contain no personal or inside information; we will release a sanitized bulletin after regulator clearance.
